DecisionNotes: Candidates are NOT formal labels: they are eligible-for-promotion descriptors. The formal dataset has not been changed.
FormalLabelsRealized stays false until controlled formal ingestion (V9.5 feedback pipeline) actually writes labels into the formal training set under human review.
RuntimePilotExecutionReadyForSeparateGate stays false until FormalEvidenceSufficient becomes true.

Fields.Description: Stable id for the rollback operation; immutable once issued.
Formal label ids to retract (must reference labels that were actually realized into the formal training set).
Reason code: HashMismatch / EvidencePathInvalid / OperatorRequest / DownstreamFailure.
What surfaced the need: Integrity / Operator / Downstream.
Path to the formal-training-set snapshot from before the rollback (V8-style restore reference).
Path to the revocation record produced by the rollback (V8.18 revocation contract).
Must be one of Retracted / Quarantined; never Realized.
Set when the rollback was applied (this contract never sets it).

RollbackTriggers: IntegrityManifest hash mismatch on any realized label
Evidence path invalidated (source ranking pair removed or rewritten)
Downstream pilot detects regression vs reference
RollbackPreconditions: Rollback may only be issued AFTER labels are actually realized (FormalLabelsRealized=true).
Rollback MUST reference an existing formal-training-set snapshot (V8-style rollback binding required).
Rollback MUST emit a revocation record under the V8.18 schema.
Rollback MUST keep V8 scoped activation state intact (no cross-pollination with V8 evidence).
RollbackActions: Read snapshot, restore formal training set entries to pre-realization state.
Mark affected labels LifecycleState=Retracted in the integrity manifest.
Emit revocation record per V8.18 contract.
